overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character traversing a misty marshland, transitioning from shallow waters to a dirt path through tall grass, and finally reaching a coastal overlook with ocean views under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy wetland with shallow water and lily pads

agents.ego_description: samurai character wading through shallow marsh water surrounded by tall reeds and pine forest

entered.detail: shallow reflective water with lily pads covering the ground
tall green and brown grass swaying in the wind
tall dark pine trees forming a forest boundary
dense fog-covered trees in the distance creating atmospheric depth

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai walking through a misty marsh, water splashing beneath his feet. Tall reeds and grasses surround the path while pine trees stand in the background under an overcast sky. The atmosphere is serene and isolated, with natural diffused lighting creating soft shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path through tall grassland approaching coast

events.description: character steps onto dry dirt path leaving the shallow marsh water behind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an emerging dirt trail through swaying tall grass

entered.detail: narrow brown dirt trail winding through the grassland
distant view of the ocean horizon becoming visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to a dry dirt path cutting through tall grass. The marsh recedes into the background as the landscape opens up, revealing a distant ocean view on the horizon. The pine trees shift to the sides as the path leads toward the coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with panoramic ocean views

events.description: path opens to reveal expansive ocean view with distant islands and rocky coastline
character stops walking and turns to survey the coastal landscape

agents.ego_description: reaching a coastal vantage point, stopping to look out over the misty ocean and distant islands

entered.detail: rocky islands silhouetted against the gray sky in the ocean distance
dark rocky outcroppings along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a breathtaking coastal overlook with the ocean stretching to the horizon. The character stops walking and turns to take in the view of distant islands and rocky shores. The marsh and forest are now far behind, replaced by open coastal grassland and the expansive sea under heavy clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty marshland that gradually opens into an expansive coastal overlook. It begins with a samurai wading through shallow water and tall reeds, surrounded by pine trees under a serene, overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the water recedes and the terrain shifts to a dry dirt path cutting through tall grass, causing the landscape to open up and reveal the distant ocean on the horizon. The scene then expands as the path leads away from the forest and toward the coast, finally arriving at a rocky overlook where the character stops to view distant islands and the vast sea under heavy clouds.
